name: @insta-saas/desktop
description: InstaFlow — Instagram DM automation desktop app
author: InstaFlow

scripts.build: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:electron
scripts.dist: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:win: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run build && electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:dir: cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npm run build && electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.yml
